TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Bud Acton hintgan nya ga kawas te 1942, byacing te 1, ryax te 11, minkahul squ Misiken Co na Amerika. hiya ga ppzyuy mari waya nqu NBA, ru wayal mhngaw misuw qani la. 198 senci qu kinwagiq nya, 95 kg qu kin'suw nya. trang squ kawas 1967 tehuk 196 ga, minrraw sa Rocket, lahuy na Santiyako (Syustun Rocket lalu m misuw qani) min 23 pspung myuwi mari. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ő≤u* a ¶~ ®ton ńßint…£an nja …£a kawas~…ē te ****, ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč te *, rjax te **, minkańßul s~…ēqu mis~…ēiken ¶~ ®o na amerika. ńßija …£a ppzjuj mari waja nqu nő≤a, ru wajal mńßŇčaw mis~…ēuw qani la. *** s~…ēen ¶~ ®i qu kinwa…£iq nja, ** k…£ qu kin Ēs~…ēuw nja. traŇč s~…ēqu kawas~…ē **** teńßuk *** …£a, minrraw s~…ēa ro ¶~ ®ket, lańßuj na s~…ēantijako (s~…ējus~…ētun ro ¶~ ®ket lalu m mis~…ēuw qani) min ** ps~…ēpuŇč mjuwi mari. kinő≤lajqan pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an s~…ēa qnxan nija Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
S.FORM: Bud Acton hintgan nya ga kawas te 1942, byacing te 1, ryax te 11, minkahul squ Misiken Co na Amerika. hiya ga ppzyuy mari waya nqu NBA, ru wayal mhngaw misuw qani la. 198 senci qu kinwagiq nya, 95 kg qu kin'suw nya. trang squ kawas 1967 tehuk 196 ga, minrraw sa Rocket, lahuy na Santiyako (Syustun Rocket lalu m misuw qani) min 23 pspung myuwi mari. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
